title: Reesbon clan
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Reesbon clan''' was one of the six controlling clans on [[Ammuud/Legends|Ammuud]]. Reesbon officers were stationed at the spaceport where [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Hart-and-Parn Gorra-Fiolla|Fiolla]] landed in one of the [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] ship lifeboats, after ''[[Lady of Mindor]]'' was intercepted and boarded by [[Bonadan/Legends|Bonadan]] [[Slavery/Legends|slavers]] ring.

==Appearances==
*''[[Han Solo's Revenge]]'' {{1st}}
